sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109676" key="u(riato/mos" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑριατόμος·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁ τὰ κηρία τέμνων τῶν μελισσῶν,</foreign> Id.; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὕρον.</foreign> </entryFree>
